title: The future of software engineering, tokenmaxxing and AI in higher education
summary: IBM's Mixture of Experts podcast explores how software engineering roles are evolving with AI, the trend of tokenmaxxing as companies exhaust annual AI budgets quickly, and challenges AI adoption poses to higher education. The discussion includes NVIDIA's RTX Spark superchip enabling large models on personal computers and the need for mandatory AI literacy in universities.
